name: Longest Consecutive Sequence in an Array
category: Solve Problems on Arrays [Easy -> Medium -> Hard]
statement:
Given an array nums of n integers.


Return the length of the longest sequence of consecutive integers. The integers in this sequence can appear in any order.

examples.explanation: The longest sequence of consecutive elements in the array is [1, 2, 3, 4], which has a length of 4. This sequence can be formed regardless of the initial order of the elements in the array.
The longest sequence of consecutive elements in the array is [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8], which has a length of 9.
